---
format:
  aagi-html+report:
    toc: true
    self-contained: true
    fig-path: figures/html-report/
execute:
  echo: false
params:
  aagi_staff: "your_name"
  project_code: "ABC2026-001ABC"
  report_title: "My Report Title"
  partner: "collab_partner_org"
  partner_email: "collab_partner@email.com.au"
  aagi_email: "your.email@example.edu.au"

date: last-modified
date-format: long
bibliography: references.bib

# Do NOT hardcode csl — handled by extension

title: "`r sprintf('Analytics for the Australian Grains Industry - %s (AAGI-%s) Technical Report Series: 123', params$uni_info[[params$uni]]$name, params$uni)`"
subtitle: "`r sprintf('%s  \\nReport for %s', params$report_title, params$project_code)`"
author:
  - "`r sprintf('Prepared for: %s (%s)', params$partner, params$partner_email)`"
  - "`r sprintf('Prepared by: %s', params$aagi_staff)`"
university: "`r params$uni_info[[params$uni]]$name`"
email: "`r params$aagi_email`"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
#| message: false

source("_scripts/setup_reports.R", local = TRUE)
```

::: {.aagi-titlepage}

![](_extensions/AAGI-AUS/aagi/assets/AAGI_logo.svg){.aagi-logo}

:::: {.aagi-title_block}
**Analytics for the Australian Grains Industry**  
**`r uni_name` (AAGI-`r params$uni`)**  
**AAGI Program Report**

# `r params$report_title`

## Report for `r params$project_code`

Prepared for: **`r params$partner` (`r params$partner_email`)**  
Prepared by: **`r params$aagi_staff`**  
Correspondence email: <`r params$aagi_email`>  
_Last updated: `r Sys.Date()`_
::::

![](_extensions/AAGI-AUS/aagi/assets/AAGI_SP_Logo_Block-Portrait.svg){.aagi-partners}
:::

# Executive Summary

This document demonstrates the **AAGI HTML report format** provided by the `AAGIQuarto` extension.

# Introduction

The `aagi-html+report` format applies AAGI branding to Quarto HTML output.

# Experimental/Trial Design

- Trial design type and layout.

# Exploratory Data Analysis and Data Visualisation

- Interpretation of plots and data.

# Methods

Detailed description of the procedures used.

# Results and Discussion

Findings and their implications.

# References

::: {#refs}
:::

# Appendix (Optional)

Additional supporting information.
